name: Famous Waer Wolf Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg Hidden Valley Dressing Mix - dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the garlic.
2. Add the chopped garlic to a food processor with the cottage cheese and Hidden Valley dressing mix.
3. Process until smooth, thinning with milk if needed (usually required).
4. The name "Water Wolf" is fitting due to the generous amount of garlic used in this recipe.
